content.title: Nvidia is still an AI powerhouse as chip stocks rally in April
content.description:
Shares of chip giant Nvidia (NVDA) are on a tear in the month of April after a wobbly March.

Great Hill Capital chairman Thomas Hayes joins Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Ines Ferré to examine Nvidia's current position in the AI semiconductor space.

headline: Lam Research Drawn Into Musk’s Terafab AI Chip Ambitions
summary: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) has been identified as a supplier engaged by Elon Musk’s Terafab initiative, a new AI chip complex involving Tesla, SpaceX, Intel, and xAI. Terafab is seeking pricing and delivery timelines from leading semiconductor equipment makers, including Lam Research, for advanced chip manufacturing capacity. The project targets cutting edge semiconductor production with applications in AI and space, positioning Lam Research within an early stage fabrication...
